fields.description:
As a user, I want to log in to OrangeHRM so that I can access the HR management system.

App URL: https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA

AC1 - Given I navigate to the login URL, then the page title should be "OrangeHRM".
AC2 - Given I am on the login page, then I should see a Username field, a Password field, and a Login button.
AC3 - Given I am on the login page, then I should see a credential hint box displaying "Username: Admin" and "Password: admin123".
AC4 - Given I am on the login page, then I should see a "Forgot your password?" link.
AC5 - Given I am on the login page, then the footer should display "OrangeHRM OS 5.8".
AC6 - Given I enter username "Admin" and password "admin123", when I click Login, then I should be redirected to the dashboard.
AC7 - Given I have logged in successfully, then the dashboard page should be visible and the user menu should show the logged-in user.
AC8 - Given I enter an invalid username, when I click Login, then I should see an error message "Invalid credentials".
AC9 - Given I enter username "Admin" and an incorrect password, when I click Login, then I should see an error message "Invalid credentials".
AC10 - Given I leave the Username field empty and click Login, then a "Required" validation message should appear.
AC11 - Given I leave the Password field empty and click Login, then a "Required" validation message should appear.
AC12 - Given I leave both fields empty and click Login, then "Required" validation messages should appear below both fields.

As a logged-in user, I want to log out of OrangeHRM so that my session is terminated and my account is secured.

App URL: https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA

AC1 - Given I am logged in, when I click on the user profile icon in the top-right navigation, then a dropdown should appear with a "Logout" option.
AC2 - Given I click the "Logout" option, then I should be redirected to the login page.
AC3 - Given I have logged out, when I navigate to a protected page using the browser back button, then I should be redirected back to the login page.
AC4 - Given I have logged out, then my session should be fully invalidated.
AC5 - Given I am on the login page after logout, then the Username and Password fields should be empty.

fields.summary: Dashboard Navigation – Verify all menu items load correct pages
fields.description:
As a logged-in user, I want every sidebar navigation item to load its corresponding page so that I can access all HR modules without errors.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA

AC1 - Given I am logged in, when I click "Admin" in the left sidebar, then the Admin module page should load with no errors.
AC2 - Given I am logged in, when I click "PIM" in the left sidebar, then the PIM module page should load.
AC3 - Given I am logged in, when I click "Leave", then the Leave module page should load.
AC4 - Given I am logged in, when I click "Time", then the Time module page should load.
AC5 - Given I am logged in, when I click "Recruitment", then the Recruitment page should load.
AC6 - No page should return a 404 or 500 error.

fields.summary: Login fails with valid credentials on first attempt
fields.description:
When entering valid credentials (Admin / admin123) on the login page, the login button sometimes does not respond on the first click and requires a second click to authenticate.

Steps to Reproduce:
1. Navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login
2. Enter username: Admin
3. Enter password: admin123
4. Click Login

Expected: User is redirected to dashboard immediately.
Actual: Login button click is ignored; page stays on login screen. Second click works.

fields.summary: Forgot Password link does not send reset email
fields.description:
Clicking the 'Forgot your password?' link on the login page opens the reset form, but submitting a valid email address does not trigger a password reset email.

Steps to Reproduce:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Click 'Forgot your password?'
3. Enter a valid registered email address.
4. Click 'Reset Password'.

Expected: A password reset email is sent to the provided address.
Actual: The form submits but no email is received. No error message is displayed.

fields.summary: Search Employee by Name returns no results for partial matches
fields.description:
In the PIM > Employee List, using the search box to search for an employee by a partial name (e.g. 'Joh' instead of 'John') returns 0 results, even though matching employees exist.

Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as Admin.
2. Navigate to PIM > Employee List.
3. In the Employee Name field, type a partial name e.g. 'Joh'.
4. Click Search.

Expected: Employees whose names contain 'Joh' are returned.
Actual: 0 results returned.

fields.summary: Add New Employee – Full workflow validation
fields.description:
As an HR admin, I want to add new employees to the system so that their HR records are created and accessible.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA

AC1 - Given I navigate to PIM > Add Employee, then I should see a form with First Name, Middle Name, Last Name, and Employee ID fields.
AC2 - Given I fill in First Name and Last Name (required), when I click Save, then a new employee record should be created.
AC3 - Given I leave First Name empty, when I click Save, then a validation error should appear.
AC4 - Given I enter a duplicate Employee ID, when I click Save, then a unique ID error should appear.
AC5 - Given the employee is created, then I should be redirected to the employee's Personal Details page.
AC6 - Given I navigate to Employee List, then the newly created employee should appear in the list.
